overlap_notes: Bulk RNA-seq arm of the Nat Commun 2023 macrophage/neutrophil IBD study. GEO lists 56 colon-biopsy bulk RNA-seq samples; the publication reports bulk RNA-seq from HC n=8, active CD n=22, and active UC n=26. This is the same study family as DS017/scRNA-seq and DS018/CosMx, but no public subject-level crosswalk was found to prove or exclude overlap with the scRNA-seq cohort. Do not sum with DS017/DS018 for unique-subject counts unless source-level participant IDs are reconciled.

scRNA-seq arm of the Nat Commun 2023 macrophage/neutrophil IBD study. GEO and the publication report 18 colonic mucosa samples: HC n=6, UC n=6, and CD n=6. Same study family as DS004/bulk RNA-seq and DS018/CosMx. Public sample titles do not provide a subject-level crosswalk to DS004, so independent unique-subject counting remains Unclear; DS018 appears to be a separate CosMx cohort but should still be grouped under the same study family.

CosMx spatial transcriptomics arm of the Nat Commun 2023 macrophage/neutrophil IBD study. GEO and the publication report 9 FFPE colon samples: 3 non-IBD controls, 3 CD, and 3 UC. The paper describes this as an additional FFPE/surgical-resection CosMx cohort, distinct in sampling modality from DS017/scRNA-seq, but keep countability Unclear for registry-level unique-subject counting because no public crosswalk to DS004/DS017 subject IDs was found.
